title: monardella linoides subsp. stricta
intro: Monardella linoides subsp. stricta, also known as Purple Sage, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Purple Sage include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Purple Sage include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to make medicinal remedies, such as cough syrups and stress-relieving tonics.
